assets.notes: Shared deterministic product placeholder until external glTF product asset is approved.
Shared deterministic gameplay placeholder with physics, animation, particles, and audio-state metrics.
Shared generated headphone configurator asset descriptor used by Aura3D, Three.js, and Babylon.js benchmark scenes.
Shared generated architecture viewer model descriptor with zone, hierarchy, selection, and section-view metadata.
Generated asset inspection workload descriptor for same-scene load/render comparison.
Generated PBR material grid descriptor for bounded material comparison.
Generated large static architecture district workload descriptor.
Generated instancing workload descriptor with 4096 equivalent instances.
Generated skinned-character benchmark descriptor; real skinned glTF parity remains unsupported.
Generated particle-field benchmark descriptor for bounded same-scaffold particle workload comparison.
Bounded V4 postprocess workload descriptor using Aura3D tone-mapping, bloom, FXAA, and depth-readback evidence; HDR/postprocess parity remains unsupported.
Generated morph-character workload descriptor for same-scene comparison metadata; real morph glTF visual parity remains unsupported.
Checked-in editor-authored exported app startup descriptor; benchmark wrappers load the same exported project metadata and keep native external-editor workflow parity unsupported.
